mapper.select:
SELECT t.* FROM (SELECT a.user_id userId,a.user_b_id userBId,a.clean_type cleanType, CASE clean_type WHEN 1 THEN '普洗' WHEN 2 THEN '精洗' WHEN 3 THEN '自动' WHEN 4 THEN '夜洗' WHEN 5 THEN '免费' ELSE '洗车' END AS cleanName, CASE car_type WHEN 1 THEN '小型轿车' WHEN 2 THEN '小型越野' WHEN 3 THEN '大型越野' WHEN 4 THEN '商务车' ELSE '小型轿车' END AS carName, clean_indent_number cleanIndentNumber,amount*0.9 amount,indent_state indentState,b.url imgUrl,is_evaluation isEvaluation, a.create_time createTime,a.resource,CONCAT('') rescueName, CONCAT('') currentPosition FROM app_clean_indet as a LEFT JOIN app_merchants_info_banner as b on a.user_b_id = b.user_b_id WHERE a.user_b_id = #{id} AND resource = 1 AND b.`index`= 1 AND (a.indent_state = 3 or a.indent_state = 6) union all
SELECT a.user_id userId,a.user_b_id userBId,a.clean_type cleanType,b.beauty_name cleanName, CASE a.car_type WHEN 1 THEN '小型轿车' WHEN 2 THEN '小型越野' WHEN 3 THEN '大型越野' WHEN 4 THEN '商务车' ELSE '小型轿车' END AS carName,a.clean_indent_number cleanIndentNumber,amount*0.9 amount,a.indent_state indentState,c.url imgUrl,is_evaluation isEvaluation,a.create_time createTime,a.resource,CONCAT('') rescueName, CONCAT('') currentPosition FROM app_clean_indet as a LEFT JOIN app_beauty_type as b ON a.clean_type = b.beauty_type LEFT JOIN app_merchants_info_banner as c on a.user_b_id = c.user_b_id WHERE a.user_b_id = #{id} AND resource = 2 AND c.`index` = 1 AND (a.indent_state = 3 or a.indent_state = 6)
union all SELECT a.user_id userId,a.user_b_id userBId,a.type cleanType, CASE a.type WHEN 1 THEN '搭电' WHEN 2 THEN '拖车' WHEN 3 THEN '送胎' ELSE '救援' END AS cleanName,CONCAT('不限车型') carName,a.rescue_number cleanIndentNumber,price*0.8 amount,a.state indentState,b.url imgUrl,CONCAT(1) isEvaluation,a.create_time createTime,CONCAT(3) resource ,rescue_name rescueName, current_position currentPosition FROM app_rescue_indent as a LEFT JOIN app_rescue_img as b on a.type = b.type WHERE a.user_b_id = #{id} AND a.state = 6
union all SELECT a.user_id userId,a.user_b_id userBId,CONCAT('')cleanType, CONCAT('喷漆')cleanName,brand_type carName,a.spray_paint_number cleanIndentNumber, a.price*0.8 amount,a.state indentState,b.url url,a.is_evaluation isEvaluation, a.create_time createTime,CONCAT(4) resource,CONCAT('') rescueName,pick_address currentPosition FROM app_spray_paint_indent as a LEFT JOIN app_merchants_info_banner as b ON a.user_b_id = b.user_b_id WHERE a.user_b_id = #{id} AND b.`index` = 1 AND (a.state = 3 or a.state = 6)
union all SELECT a.user_id userId,a.user_b_id userBId,CONCAT('')cleanType, CASE a.year_check_type WHEN 1 THEN '免检代办' WHEN 2 THEN '线上年检' ELSE '年检' END AS cleanName,CONCAT('不限车型') carName,a.year_check_number cleanIndentNumber,a.price*0.8 amount,a.state indentState,b.url imgUrl, CONCAT(1) isEvaluation,a.create_time createTime,CONCAT(5) resource,CONCAT('') rescueName,pick_address currentPosition FROM app_year_check_indent as a LEFT JOIN app_merchants_info_banner as b ON a.user_b_id = b.user_b_id WHERE b.`index` = 1 AND a.user_b_id = #{id} AND a.state = 6
)t order by createTime DESC LIMIT #{pagesize},20

SELECT b.`name` username,b.username phoneTail,a.clean_indent_number cleanIndentNumber,a.indent_state indentState,amount,a.create_time createTime, CASE a.clean_type WHEN 1 THEN '普洗' WHEN 2 THEN '精洗' WHEN 3 THEN '自动' WHEN 4 THEN '夜洗' WHEN 5 THEN '免费' ELSE '洗车' END AS cleanName, CASE a.car_type WHEN 1 THEN '小型轿车' WHEN 2 THEN '小型越野' WHEN 3 THEN '大型越野' WHEN 4 THEN '商务车' ELSE '小型轿车' END AS carName ,c.url imgUrl,a.clean_type cleanType,a.car_type carType FROM app_clean_indet as a LEFT JOIN app_user AS b ON a.user_id = b.id LEFT JOIN app_merchants_info_banner as c ON c.user_b_id = a.user_b_id WHERE clean_indent_number = #{cleanIndentNumber} AND c.`index` = 1

SELECT b.`name` username,b.username phoneTail,a.clean_indent_number cleanIndentNumber,a.indent_state indentState,amount,a.create_time createTime, CASE a.car_type WHEN 1 THEN '小型轿车' WHEN 2 THEN '小型越野' WHEN 3 THEN '大型越野' WHEN 4 THEN '商务车' ELSE '小型轿车' END AS carName, d.beauty_name cleanName ,c.url imgUrl,a.clean_type cleanType,a.car_type carType FROM app_clean_indet as a LEFT JOIN app_user AS b ON a.user_id = b.id LEFT JOIN app_merchants_info_banner as c ON c.user_b_id = a.user_b_id LEFT JOIN app_beauty_type as d ON a.clean_type = d.beauty_type WHERE clean_indent_number = #{cleanIndentNumber} AND c.`index` = 1
SELECT garment_clean FROM app_clean_img WHERE car_type = #{carType}
SELECT fine_clean FROM app_clean_img WHERE car_type = #{carType}

SELECT SUM(con) count FROM( SELECT COUNT(1) con FROM app_clean_indet WHERE user_b_id = #{id} AND (indent_state = 3 or indent_state = 6) AND TO_DAYS(create_time) = TO_DAYS(NOW()) union ALL SELECT COUNT(1) con FROM app_rescue_indent WHERE user_b_id = #{id} AND state = 6 AND TO_DAYS(create_time) = TO_DAYS(NOW()) union ALL SELECT COUNT(1) con FROM app_spray_paint_indent WHERE user_b_id = #{id} AND (state = 3 or state = 6) AND TO_DAYS(create_time) = TO_DAYS(NOW()) union all SELECT COUNT(1) con FROM app_year_check_indent WHERE user_b_id = #{id} AND (state = 3 or state = 6) AND TO_DAYS(create_time) = TO_DAYS(NOW())
)t
SELECT url FROM app_beauty_img WHERE beauty_type = #{cleanType}

SELECT SUM(if((user_b_id = #{userBId} AND TO_DAYS(create_time) = TO_DAYS(NOW())),1,0)) todayIndent, SUM(if(pay_state=1 AND resource = 1 AND user_b_id= #{userBId},amount,0)) allEarnings, SUM(if((user_b_id = #{userBId} ),1,0)) allIndentCount, SUM(if((user_b_id = #{userBId} AND indent_state =2 ),1,0)) newIntentCount, SUM(if((user_b_id = #{userBId} AND indent_state =2 ),1,0)) inServiceCount, CONCAT(0) obligationCount, SUM(if((user_b_id = #{userBId} AND is_evaluation =0 ),1,0)) toEvaluateCount, SUM(if((user_b_id = #{userBId} AND indent_state =4 ),1,0)) cancelledCount FROM app_clean_indet
